description: Cross-version notes on the Agda IOTCM --interaction-json protocol, derived from reading the official Haskell sources in agda/agda.

loadResponseSequence.description: After Cmd_load, Agda emits InteractionPoints, then one or more DisplayInfo/AllGoalsWarnings, then Status. The order is stable across all consulted versions.

responses.notes: Numeric InteractionId values. These are the visible interaction points (holes) the user wrote.

visibleGoals are OutputConstraint entries keyed by InteractionId (user-written holes). invisibleGoals are OutputConstraint entries keyed by NamedMeta (unsolved metavariables Agda created internally). May be emitted multiple times per load.
checked=true means the module was successfully type-checked.

visibleGoals.description: User-written interaction points ({!!}, {! expr !}, ?). Each has a stable InteractionId for interactive commands (give, refine, case-split).

invisibleGoals.description: Metavariables Agda created during elaboration but could not solve. Includes implicit arguments that remain open and — critically — holes inside abstract blocks, which have no InteractionId. Keyed by NamedMeta; in JSON this is represented as a {name, range} object, where the name string encodes the meta identity rather than exposing separate id/module fields.

postulates.description: Postulates are accepted as complete definitions. They do not appear in visibleGoals or invisibleGoals. A file with only postulates and no holes/metas is ok-complete.

v2.7.0.1_to_v2.8.0: Resp_JumpToError position type changed from Int32 to Word32.
GoalAndElaboration payload changed from I.Term to A.Expr (internal, JSON encoding unchanged).
v2.8.0_to_master: Resp_RunningInfo message changed from String to DocTree (may affect JSON encoding of running info messages).
Goal_HelperFunction constraint changed from OutputConstraint' A.Expr A.Expr to OutputConstraint' A.Expr C.Name.
stableAcrossAll: AllGoalsWarnings JSON shape: { kind, visibleGoals, invisibleGoals, warnings, errors }.
Goals_boot type alias: (visible metas/goals, hidden unsolved metas).
OutputConstraint encoding via encodeOC with constraintObj and type fields.
